title: 7 Best Sendinblue Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best Sendinblue alternatives. Compare top email marketing tools for your business needs.
h1: Best Sendinblue Alternatives for Email Marketing
intro: While Sendinblue (now Brevo) offers a robust all-in-one CRM suite, you might be looking for alternatives that better suit your specific needs, budget, or industry focus. Whether you're a creator, small business owner, or e-commerce brand, there are several excellent email marketing platforms that deliver comparable or superior features for different use cases.
why_switch: Better feature focus for your specific industry or business type
More competitive pricing or higher email/subscriber limits in the free tier
Superior user experience and customer support ratings

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers the most budget-friendly pricing starting at just $9/month, with an extremely user-friendly drag-and-drop editor. For small businesses wanting to avoid complexity, it's an excellent choice with solid automation and landing page features at a fraction of the cost.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv stands out for creators with built-in newsletter monetization and an ad network that lets you earn revenue directly from your audience. If you're building a paid newsletter business, its publisher-first features and highest G2 rating (4.7) make it the superior choice.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is purpose-built for content creators with visual automation, subscriber tagging, and integrated commerce features that Sendinblue lacks. Its focus on creator economics and clean interface make it ideal for independent writers, podcasters, and online course authors.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign provides more sophisticated automation workflows and lead scoring capabilities than Sendinblue, making it better for mid-market B2B companies. With deep CRM integration and site tracking, it's ideal for sales-driven organizations that need advanced customer journey mapping.

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce with predictive analytics, pre-built flows for online stores, and deep Shopify/WooCommerce integration that far exceeds Sendinblue's capabilities. If you're running an online store, its revenue-focused features and G2 rating of 4.6 make it the industry standard.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp offers more generous free tiers with 500 subscribers and no daily sending limits, plus excellent marketing automation and audience segmentation tools. It's the most accessible platform for absolute beginners, though its lower Trustpilot rating suggests some service quality concerns.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse uniquely combines email marketing with native webinar hosting and online course functionality, making it perfect for educational creators and infopreneurs. Its all-in-one approach eliminates the need for multiple tool subscriptions if you're running courses or live events.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Sendinblue?
faq.a: MailerLite and Beehiiv both offer excellent free tiers—MailerLite allows 1,000 subscribers with unlimited campaigns, while Beehiiv supports 2,500 subscribers with monetization features. Both have more generous limits than Mailchimp's 500-subscriber free tier, making them better starting points for growing businesses.

faq.q: What is the best Sendinblue alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the top choice for small businesses due to its affordable pricing (starting at $9/month), intuitive interface, and essential features like automation and landing pages. For budget-conscious teams, it delivers professional email marketing without the learning curve of more complex platforms.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Sendinblue?
faq.a: Yes—MailerLite ($9/month) and GetResponse ($19/month) both undercut Sendinblue's $25 starting price. MailerLite offers the lowest paid tier while maintaining excellent features, making it the most economical choice for businesses watching their marketing spend.
